name: the routed consult audit is composite-audit — the same native+routed engine development uses at audit time
command:
printf '%s' '{"complete":true,"answers":{"motivation":"revenue","availability_tolerance":"minutes","data_loss_tolerance":"minutes","budget_posture":"balanced","data_volume":"large","read_write_pattern":"balanced","data_cadence":"real-time","workload":"x","criticality":"mission-critical","data_sensitivity":"confidential","compliance_regime":"none","scale":"large","consistency_need":"strong","communication_style":"event-driven","integration_scope":"public"}}' > p.json
ARCHITECT_ENFORCE_ROUTED=1 bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/commands/architect-session.sh" --vision x --profile p.json --out-dir s --now 2026-06-08T00:00:00Z 2>se.txt
grep -q 'engine=composite-audit' se.txt && grep -q 'composite-dispatch' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/rubric/composite-audit.sh" && grep -q 'composite-dispatch' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/hooks/scripts/enforce-standards-on-save.sh" && echo routed-same-as-dev 1>&2
